name: ariadne-worklanes
description: Local worklane observability for long-running agent and ops sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Track long-running agent work as visible worklanes.
interface.longDescription: Ariadne Worklanes gives agents MCP tools for writing structured worklane status files and a local dashboard for showing baseline-aware progress cards across long-running ops, DevOps, and recovery sessions.
defaultPrompt: Start an Ariadne worklane for this long-running task.
Update the Ariadne worklane status before handing off.
